auth.enterEmail: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

lobby.title: Private Lobby
lobby.subtitle: Invite one friend, wait in the room, then start when both are ready.
lobby.homeSubtitle: Create an untimed friendly room instantly, invite one friend, then start when both are ready.
lobby.untimedModeHint: No move timer limit. Each player clock counts up while it is their turn.
lobby.inviteHint: Share this link. If they are not logged in yet, they will sign in first and come back here automatically.
lobby.copyFailed: Failed to copy the invite link.
lobby.waitingGuest: Waiting for a second player to join this room.
lobby.countdownHint: Either player can cancel during this countdown.
lobby.hostHelp: The host can only start after the guest has joined and is ready.
lobby.guestHelp: You join as ready by default. Toggle your ready state if needed.
lobby.connectionError: Could not connect to the live lobby service.

status.degradedBody: The server is temporarily unavailable. We will keep your session and retry automatically.
status.recoveringBody: Trying to restore the server connection and rehydrate your session.
status.actionsDisabled: Live actions are temporarily disabled while the app reconnects to the server.

rules.title: Animal Chess Rules
rules.subtitle: This guide matches the exact rules currently enforced in Zootact.
rules.pageSubtitle: Learn how Zootact Animal Chess works before you queue or challenge a friend.
rules.pageBodySubtitle: Shown in the selected app language and aligned with the current game implementation.
rules.panelBodySubtitle: Expanded by default on desktop so you can check a rule without leaving the match.
rules.mobileBodySubtitle: Open the full Rules page if you want the complete guide outside the match.
rules.modalBodySubtitle: Only the practical rules you need while playing. Open the full Rules page for the complete guide.
rules.quickPanelSubtitle: The key rules you are most likely to need during a match.

quickPanel.note: Exceptions: Elephant cannot capture Rat. Rat captures Elephant only from land. River and land pieces cannot capture each other.

summary.0: Move 1 square up, down, left, or right.
summary.1: Enter the opponent's den to win immediately.
summary.2: Only Rat can enter river; Lion and Tiger may jump across it.
summary.3: Enemy traps drop that piece's rank to 0.

rules.homeTitle: Read the rules before you jump in
rules.homeSubtitle: See the exact movement, capture, river, trap, and draw rules used by the current game.

quickFacts.0: Move one square orthogonally. No diagonal moves.
quickFacts.1: Entering the opponent's den wins immediately.
quickFacts.2: Only the Rat can enter the river.
quickFacts.3: A Rat on land cannot capture a Rat in the river, and a Rat in the river cannot capture a Rat on land.
quickFacts.4: Draws happen by agreement, repetition, the 60 half-move rule, or stalemate.

bullets.0: Every piece moves exactly one square up, down, left, or right.
bullets.1: A piece cannot stay in place, move off the board, or enter its own den.
bullets.2: Entering the opponent's den wins the game immediately.
bullets.3: You also win if the opponent has no remaining pieces, resigns, or runs out of time.

bullets.0: Only the Rat can enter the river, move inside it, and leave it again.
bullets.1: All other pieces are blocked from river cells.
bullets.2: Lion and Tiger may jump across a full river lane in a straight line.
bullets.3: A Rat standing anywhere in that river path blocks the Lion or Tiger jump.

bullets.0: A piece can capture an enemy piece only if its effective rank is at least as high.
bullets.2: Rat can capture Elephant only from land; a Rat in the river cannot do it.
bullets.3: Pieces in the river cannot capture pieces on land, and land pieces cannot capture pieces in the river, including Rat versus Rat across river and land.
bullets.4: A piece standing in the opponent's trap has its effective rank reduced to 0.

bullets.0: A draw happens if both players agree, the same position repeats three times, or 60 half-moves pass without a capture.
bullets.1: If the current player has no legal moves, the game is a draw by stalemate.
bullets.2: Timeout, resignation, den capture, and capturing all enemy pieces all end the game immediately.

captureMatrix.title: Which Pieces Can Capture Which
captureMatrix.subtitle: This list reflects the current rank logic used by the game on normal squares. Trap effects can lower the defender to rank 0.
captureMatrix.compactSubtitle: Each row shows the strongest piece this animal can legally capture on normal ground.
captureMatrix.note: Special cases: Elephant cannot capture Rat. Rat can capture Elephant only from land. A trapped enemy can be captured more easily because its effective rank becomes 0.

profile.subtitle: View your account, track your performance, and update the basics of your profile.
profile.recentGamesHint: Your latest completed matches appear here.
profile.recentEmpty: No completed matches yet. Play a game and your history will appear here.
profile.editHint: You can update your display name used across the app.
profile.ratedStatsHint: Rated match performance affects your Forest Points.
profile.friendlyStatsHint: Friendly matches are tracked in history but do not change your Elo.
